finding_results.notes: Every wound reference in the discovery and dock-assessment sequence now identifies Cliff's right temple, including the initial rotation cue and later group inference beats.

The discovery now lands through direct physical perception instead of the earlier negation-then-correction phrasing, and Joel's later reasoning beat is phrased as containment rather than a corrective formula.
Cliff is no longer reintroduced through a repeated clothing inventory; the scene keeps only the loafers because they matter to the staging clue.
The path and dock description keeps the freeze-thaw texture, trees, and dock evidence while removing the repeated eighty-yard and thirty-foot measurements.
Doug's pharmaceutical background is no longer labeled repeatedly during the body discovery. The single surviving signal is the in-the-moment 'Contraindicated' vocabulary flare.
Doug's observer role is now shown through what he notices in the room and in the suspended quiet, rather than restated in standalone character-summary sentences.
Scotch/Lagavulin references were reduced to a single plot-relevant mention when Cliff pours the drink. Later beats refer only to the glass or the drink.

Chapter word count is now 5006 while preserving the heading contract. The added material sharpens the suspended pre-discovery atmosphere and Doug/Martin grief pressure rather than padding the chapter.

pass_summaries.summary: Resolved all packet findings in chapter 14 by correcting the right-temple murder clue, stripping repeated Doug/Cliff descriptors, reducing overused drink references, and adding chapter-relevant pressure material so the discovery lands harder while clearing the 5,000-word floor.
